JScience 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.jscience.social.economics
  2. EconomicAgent

Uses of Class
org.jscience.social.economics.EconomicAgent

Packages that use EconomicAgent
Package
Description
org.jscience.social.arts
- artworks, music, literature classification.
org.jscience.social.economics
Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
org.jscience.social.economics.money
Provides classes for monetary and financial operations.
org.jscience.social.geography
Provides classes for social geography, human settlements, and mapping.
org.jscience.social.law
Provides the org.jscience.social.law module.
org.jscience.social.medicine.consultation
Core functionality for the org.jscience.social.medicine.consultation package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.social.politics
Provides the org.jscience.social.politics module.

    Subclasses of EconomicAgent in org.jscience.social.arts
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Artist
    Represents an artist (painter, sculptor, musician, etc.) as a specialized social role.

    Constructor
    Description

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Bank(String name, Identification identification, Set<EconomicAgent> owners, BusinessPlace place, Set<Account> accounts)
    Initializes a new Bank with official documentation.
     
    Factory(String name, Identification id, Set<EconomicAgent> owners, BusinessPlace place, Set<Account> accounts)
    Standard constructor for industrial organizations.
     
    Holding(String name, Identification id, Set<EconomicAgent> owners, BusinessPlace place, Set<Account> accounts, Set<Organization> organizations)
    Initializes a holding company.
     
    Organization(String name, Identification id, Set<EconomicAgent> owners, Place place, Set<Account> accounts)
    Constructor for Bank compatibility (detailed).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<EconomicAgent>
    Account.getOwners()
    Returns an unmodifiable set of account owners.
    Set<EconomicAgent>
    Share.getOwners()
    Returns an unmodifiable view of the owners.
    Methods in org.jscience.social.economics.money with parameters of type EconomicAgent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Account.addOwner(EconomicAgent owner)
    Adds an owner to the account.
    void
    Share.addOwner(EconomicAgent owner)
    Adds an owner to this share.
    void
    Account.removeOwner(EconomicAgent owner)
    Removes an owner from the account.
    void
    Share.removeOwner(EconomicAgent owner)
    Removes an owner from this share.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Account(Bank bank, Set<EconomicAgent> owners, Identification identification, String name, Money amount)

  • Uses of EconomicAgent in org.jscience.social.law

    Subclasses of EconomicAgent in org.jscience.social.law
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Judge
    Represents a judge responsible for presiding over legal proceedings and trials.
    class 
    JuryMember
    Represents a member of a jury whose role is to decide if the defendant is guilty or liable, or to determine fact-based outcomes in a trial.
    class 
    Lawyer
    The Lawyer class represents a legal professional whose primary role is to provide legal advice and represent individuals or organizations in legal matters.
    class 
    Prosecutor
    Represents a prosecutor, who is a legal professional responsible for presenting the case in a criminal trial against an individual accused of breaking the law.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<EconomicAgent>
    License.getOwners()
    Returns the set of owners of this license.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    License(EconomicAgent owner, Organization authority, Identification identification, String right)
    Creates a new License object with a single initial right.
     
    License(EconomicAgent owner, Organization authority, Identification identification, List<String> rights)
    Creates a new License object with multiple rights.
